title: Factory AI: signal-to-software, run by agents
blurb: An agentic software factory inside Atlan. Agents listen to customer signals (tickets, enhancement requests, telemetry), mine what matters, and decide what to build. Greenfield work goes end to end: PRD, TRD, implementation design, build, human-in-the-loop reviews, deploy, instrument, close the loop. Customer issues run in reverse: agents read logs and self-heal. The outcome: more features released, more customer issues resolved, and an organization freed to take on newer problems and scale faster.

title: Agent Harness Workshop: eCommerce Support Agent
blurb: A 90-minute workshop and a working reference implementation for production AI agent infrastructure: input/output guardrails, agent loop, context engineering, memory, MCP tool access, per-ticket sandboxes, LiteLLM cost tracking, Langfuse tracing. Cloneable repo, recorded session, adaptable architecture, built for engineering leaders who are shipping agents without half the guardrails.

title: Reference repo: ecommerceSupportAgent
blurb: The cloneable code behind the workshop. Real agent loop, MCP tools, per-ticket sandboxes, evals, observability, wired together end-to-end so engineering teams can fork and ship.
